{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Yellow Titan
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Yellow Titan]] has arms that collapse into massive guns.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
